annotation.reason: Reframed thesis opening with operator's construction. Filled <mechanism> with 'discipline' — engineering register matches 'prompt engineering' and avoids the redundancy of 'truth-finding method' (since 'Socratic method' is already in the sentence). Alternatives considered: practice (humble), technique (mechanical), dialogue (echoes title — flagged for next round if you'd prefer it). New opening sentence: 'The Socratic method is an ancient truth-finding discipline that can be a surprisingly effective addition to the prompt-engineering toolkit.' Rest of thesis paragraph preserved.
